deliverables.description: Row-level hard-negative decision table with normalized components, formulas, base and sensitivity classifications, remediation outcome, decisions, needs_review reasons, and packet citations.
Review-ready plan with executable scoring logic, assumptions, intermediate calculations, sensitivity notes, budget-feasible remediation combinations, validation checks, and final decision table.

key_results.expert_review_reason: The selected O1+O2 plan leaves R1 as a warning that changes to pass under a -5% post-remediation score perturbation; R2 and R4 remain fail; packet normalization and third-metric wording also need review.
